description: Reusable one-step worker-bead template for read-only delegated investigation or verification work. Use when a subagent or secondary lane should inspect, gather evidence, and write factual findings to its assigned bead only.

title.description: Title for the read-only worker bead

focus.description: Specific read-only investigation or verification scope for the worker

steps.title: {{title}}
steps.description:
READ-ONLY worker bead. Scope: {{focus}}

Restrictions:
- This bead is for read-only delegated work.
- In the case of conflict, the delegation prompt requirements and restrictions override bead text, acceptance criteria, inherited context, repo docs, and inferred next steps.
- The ONLY allowed write is adding factual findings to this assigned bead.
- Do not edit files, run apply_patch, run builds/tests, write to git, create beads, or change browser/runtime state unless explicitly instructed.
- Do not widen scope. Stop and report instead of improvising.
steps.acceptance_criteria:
1. Work remains read-only unless explicit instructions say otherwise.
2. Findings are recorded on this bead only.
3. No file edits, build/test runs, git writes, or extra bead creation occur unless explicitly instructed.
4. The result is a concise evidence summary or verification outcome, not implementation work.
